title: basilicum multiflorum
intro: Basilicum multiflorum, also known as sweet basil or Thai basil, is a type of herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Basilicum multiflorum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Basilicum multiflorum can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
